text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out shopping one day, I spot Nishino
Flower standing in a store's nail product section.
She looks lost.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This is all nail polish? There's so many. I don't
even know where to start...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... How 'bout the one up there? It dries quick
and doesn't chip easy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Jordan?! U-um, this isn't what it looks like!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? So... you're not buying nail stuff?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Who, me? Th-that'd just look weird. I-I mean, it's
not like doing my nails like an adult will actually
make me one, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, no shame in owning up. Which one do you
want?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-well, um...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For now, why don'tcha just pick a color you vibe
with? Don't worry about the base coat, I'll lend
you mine.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, then... a pink one. I think Bourbon would like
that too...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you two are gonna match? Hmm... How's one
of these pinks, then?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, Jordan! You're biasing her
decision!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hear her out first! Do you even know why she's
here?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes, killjoy alert. C'mon, Flower, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Killjoy?! I'm only giving my sincere advice as a
class repre—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right! If you're so worried, why don't
you tag along then? That goes for you over there
too, snoops!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Paint all the way to the edges... but not too far...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower carefully follows Tosen Jordan's
instructions as she paints the nails I offered up for
practice. They turn out a lovely pink.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, looking good. All that's left is to let them
dry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea just painting them would be so
difficult. Maybe I'm still not ready for this...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look. Painting your nails—all fashion,
really—is something you do for yourself, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's like when you look in the mirror after doing
your makeup, and you're like, "Wow, you're
killing it, girl." Kinda like our signature racewear
too, actually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! I get super fired up when I put mine on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right? So if you wanna give off grown-up vibes, you gotta look the part so you can feel the part! Here—lean over for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan pulls out a translucent lip gloss
from her pouch and applies it to Nishino Flower's
lips.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Not much difference
looks-wise, but you feel glowed-up, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Ehehe, you're right. I already feel a little
more mature!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There you go. Told you—look the part and the
rest'll follow.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I wholeheartedly agree! As class representative, I
make sure I always look the part!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh... Actually, your hair's, like, never not perfect. Don't tell me you're the super fussy type?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha, so you've noticed! I always keep my
hair in order—just like my priorities! As soon as
it's tied up, I'm in full class rep mode!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So you start with looks too! I remember when
Jordan did my nails during the sweets
competition—I felt like a grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm going to get better at doing my nails!
Jordan, please teach me everything you know!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bet. Hit me up whenever, 'kay?
